---
title: "Commercial: Pumice construction"
mainfont: Courier Prime
---

1990 McCool FM - :30 second spot

---

__ANNCR: __
Once your skyline was gray and blocky, too brutal for mortal eyes. Pumice construction came and saved the day. We created concrete buildings of flowing shapes and colours. With our patented concrete technology we created the post modern brutalist wave. Better yet we can reduce the concrete back to liquid so we can easily repair and modify. This created strong but flexible cities.

__ANNCR:__ 
Our services are available to you. Pumice construction now creates residential buildings. Let us make your perfect home. Whether you want an extra floor, a basement, or even a pool our new patented concrete finish is gentle and smooth to the touch. 

__ANNCR:__
Pumice construction, buildings in a flash that last.
